dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses price crossing a 40-day moving average (sma_40) as the basis for both entry and exit. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT, so both long and short rules are provided. Exit conditions are author-silent, so reversals at the moving average are used as a reasonable exit logic. Target regime limited to TRENDING modes since the signal is designed for trend identification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses price crossing a 40-day moving average (sma_40) as the basis for both entry and exit. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT, so both long and short rules are provided. Exit conditions are author-silent, so reversals at the moving average are used as a reasonable exit logic. Target regime limited to TRENDING modes since the signal is designed for trend identification.

source_rule_text: Buy and sell signals are generated using a 40-day moving average trendline as the basis for system signals.
